---
title: "image_module_description"
author: "Daniel Schulz"
date: "2026-07-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# wordcloud

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggwordcloud)
library(ggforce)
library(cowplot)

OUT <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing"
FIGURES <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/revised_figures/Figure_2_supp"
if (!dir.exists(FIGURES)) {
  dir.create(FIGURES)
}

TOP_N <- 15  # features per meta-cluster to display

# ── Load ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
imaging_mat <- readRDS(file.path(OUT, "imaging_mat.rds"))
meta_scores <- read.csv(file.path(OUT, "patient_imaging_meta_cluster_scores.csv"),
                        row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

shared <- intersect(rownames(imaging_mat), rownames(meta_scores))
cat("Shared patients:", length(shared), "\n")

img <- imaging_mat[shared, , drop = FALSE]
ms  <- as.matrix(meta_scores[shared, , drop = FALSE])

# ── Feature × meta-cluster Pearson correlations ───────────────────────────────
# Pearson r is scale-invariant so no z-scoring needed here
cor_mat <- cor(img, ms, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")  # features × meta-clusters
cat("Correlation matrix:", nrow(cor_mat), "features ×", ncol(cor_mat), "meta-clusters\n")


# save cor mat
write.csv(as.data.frame(cor_mat),file.path(OUT,"image_feature_module_correlation.csv"))
# ── Top N features per meta-cluster ──────────────────────────────────────────
plot_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(colnames(cor_mat), function(mc) {
  r     <- cor_mat[, mc]
  r     <- r[!is.na(r)]
  top   <- names(sort(abs(r), decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(min(TOP_N, length(r)))]
  data.frame(
    meta_cluster = mc,
    feature      = top,
    r            = r[top],
    abs_r        = abs(r[top]),
    panel        = sub("_.*", "", top),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

# ── Colors ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
panels    <- sort(unique(plot_df$panel))
panel_pal <- setNames(
  colorRampPalette(c("#4DBBD5", "#E64B35", "#00A087", "#3C5488",
                     "#F39B7F", "#91D1C2", "#8491B4", "#DC0000", "#7E6148"))(length(panels)),
  panels
)

# Preserve biological meta-cluster order from the scores matrix
plot_df$meta_cluster <- factor(plot_df$meta_cluster, levels = colnames(ms))

# ── Plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(label = feature, size = abs_r, color = panel)) +
  geom_text_wordcloud(area_corr = TRUE, seed = 42, rm_outside = TRUE) +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = panel_pal, name = "Panel") +
  facet_wrap(~ meta_cluster, ncol = 4) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.border     = element_rect(color = "grey50", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey97", color = NA),
    panel.spacing    = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13)
  ) +
  guides(size  = "none",
         color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4), nrow = 2)) +
  labs(title = paste0("Top ", TOP_N, " features correlated with each imaging meta-cluster"),
       subtitle = "Feature name size proportional to |r| with meta-cluster score; color = imaging panel")

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES, "05_meta_cluster_feature_wordcloud.pdf"),device = cairo_pdf,
       p, width = 16, height = 10)
```

# Network graph

```{r}
# Meta-cluster × meta-cluster correlations (from aggregate scores)
mc_cor   <- cor(ms, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
mc_names <- colnames(ms)

# MDS layout: place similar meta-clusters close together
mc_dist <- as.dist((1 - mc_cor) / 2)
mds_raw <- cmdscale(mc_dist, k = 2)

# Keep nodes well inside [0,1] so large circles don't get clipped
rescale_range <- function(x, lo = 0.18, hi = 0.82)
  lo + (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x)) * (hi - lo)

pos <- cbind(rescale_range(mds_raw[, 1]),
             rescale_range(mds_raw[, 2]))

# Post-MDS repulsion: push overlapping nodes apart until all circles have
# at least MIN_GAP clearance between their edges.
MIN_GAP  <- 0.002    
NODE_R <- 0.10 # minimum gap between circle edges
MIN_DIST <- 2 * NODE_R + MIN_GAP        # minimum centre-to-centre distance
MIS_DIST <- 0.05
for (iter in seq_len(2000)) {
  moved <- FALSE
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pos) - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):nrow(pos)) {
      dx <- pos[j, 1] - pos[i, 1]
      dy <- pos[j, 2] - pos[i, 2]
      d  <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2)
      if (d < MIN_DIST && d > 1e-9) {
        push      <- (MIN_DIST - d) / 2
        pos[i, 1] <- pos[i, 1] - push * dx / d
        pos[i, 2] <- pos[i, 2] - push * dy / d
        pos[j, 1] <- pos[j, 1] + push * dx / d
        pos[j, 2] <- pos[j, 2] + push * dy / d
        moved <- TRUE
      }
    }
  }
  if (!moved) break
}

mds_df <- data.frame(
  meta_cluster = rownames(mds_raw),
  x            = pos[, 1],
  y            = pos[, 2],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Meta-cluster palette (consistent with script 03)
mc_pal <- setNames(
  colorRampPalette(c("#E64B35", "#4DBBD5", "#00A087", "#3C5488",
                     "#F39B7F", "#91D1C2", "#8491B4", "#DC0000"))(length(mc_names)),
  mc_names
)

# ── Base graph: circles + name labels only (no connecting edges) ──────────────
# coord_fixed() adds internal padding that breaks cowplot alignment.
# Use scale limits + expand=0 so data [0,1] maps 1:1 to ggdraw [0,1].


base_graph <- ggplot() +
  geom_circle(
    data = mds_df,
    aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = NODE_R, fill = meta_cluster),
    alpha = 0.20, color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mds_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y + NODE_R+ 0.01, label = meta_cluster),
    size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "grey20"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = mc_pal, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))

# ── Word cloud sub-plots (transparent background, one per node) ───────────────
# WC_SIZE matches the circle diameter so text fills the circle area
WC_SIZE <- NODE_R * 2

wc_plots <- lapply(mc_names, function(mc) {
  sub_df <- plot_df[as.character(plot_df$meta_cluster) == mc, ]
  ggplot(sub_df, aes(label = feature, size = abs_r, color = panel)) +
    geom_text_wordcloud(area_corr = TRUE, seed = 42, rm_outside = TRUE) +
    scale_size_area(max_size = 8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = panel_pal) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
          plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA))
})
names(wc_plots) <- mc_names

# ── Compose: overlay word clouds exactly on node centers ─────────────────────
# With expand=0 + no margins, data coordinates map directly to ggdraw [0,1]
composed <- ggdraw(base_graph)
for (mc in mc_names) {
  cx <- mds_df$x[mds_df$meta_cluster == mc]
  cy <- mds_df$y[mds_df$meta_cluster == mc]
  composed <- composed + draw_plot(
    wc_plots[[mc]],
    x      = cx - WC_SIZE / 2,
    y      = cy - WC_SIZE / 2,
    width  = WC_SIZE,
    height = WC_SIZE
  )
}

# ── Panel legend extracted from a dummy plot ──────────────────────────────────
legend_grob <- get_legend(
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = 1, y = 1, color = panel)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = panel_pal, name = "Imaging panel") +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3), nrow = 1)) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position  = "bottom",
          legend.text      = element_text(size = 9),
          legend.title     = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
)

final <- plot_grid(composed, legend_grob, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.05))

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES, "05_meta_cluster_network.pdf"),
       final, width = 10, height = 10)
```

# original correlation

```{r}
# ── Inlet: true MDS distances, circles + labels only ─────────────────────────
# Raw MDS positions rescaled to [0,1] — no repulsion, no word clouds.
# Use a small fixed circle radius so circles don't obscure the distances.
INLET_R <- 0.06

mds_true <- data.frame(
  meta_cluster = rownames(mds_raw),
  x            = rescale_range(mds_raw[, 1]),
  y            = rescale_range(mds_raw[, 2]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

inlet <- ggplot() +
  geom_circle(
    data = mds_true,
    aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = INLET_R, fill = meta_cluster),
    alpha = 0.30, color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mds_true,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = meta_cluster),
    size = 2.8, fontface = "bold", color = "grey10"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = mc_pal, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin      = margin(4, 4, 4, 4),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey70",
                                        linewidth = 0.6))

ggsave(file.path(FIGURES, "05_meta_cluster_network_inlet.pdf"),
       inlet, width = 4, height = 4)
```
